# UC-11.7.5 · Asterisk Security Log Brute-Force SIP Registration Attempts

## Description

High-velocity bad authentication against SIP registrations precedes toll fraud. Clustering by extension and source IP prioritizes blocks.

## Value

Reduces fraudulent usage charges and gives SOC an actionable VoIP-specific signal.

## Implementation

(1) Log client IP in security events. (2) Tune thresholds. (3) SOAR or firewall integration. (4) Allowlist scanners.

## SPL

```spl
index=voip sourcetype="asterisk:security" earliest=-1h
| eval user=coalesce(user, username, account, "")
| eval src=coalesce(src_ip, remote_ip, SRC, "")
| where match(lower(_raw), "(?i)failed|invalid|reject|ban|wrong password|bad auth|not match")
| stats count dc(src) as sources values(src) as src_list by user
| where count>=15 OR sources>=5
```

## Visualization

Table of users and IPs; sparkline volume.
